в””в”Җв”Җ SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.774707198932E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7708079566511982E12},"tech-doc-organizer":{"name":"tech-doc-organizer","description":"Scans, analyzes, and optimizes project technical documentation.
Detects documentation-code inconsistencies, finds merge/split opportunities, applies lint rules,
summarizes long documents using AI, archives old content, updates docs based on code changes,
AND summarizes current conversation/task context to documentation.
When user says "ж•ҙзҗҶж–ҮжЎЈ" without specific action, presents options menu for user to choose:
1. Scan (check issues), 2. Summarize (AI condense), 3. Archive (old docs), 4. Update (from diff+task), 5. Reorganize, 6. Summarize Context.
Use when users want to:
- "ж•ҙзҗҶж–ҮжЎЈ", "дјҳеҢ–ж–ҮжЎЈ", "жЈҖжҹҘж–ҮжЎЈ", "жӣҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈ"
- "зІҫз®Җж–ҮжЎЈ", "зІҫз®ҖиҝҮй•ҝж–ҮжЎЈ"
- "еҪ’жЎЈж–ҮжЎЈ", "ж—§ж–ҮжЎЈеҪ’жЎЈ"
- "ж №жҚ®д»Јз ҒеҸҳжӣҙжӣҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈ", "ж №жҚ®д»»еҠЎжӣҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈ", "жЈҖжҹҘ diff жӣҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈ"
- "жҖ»з»“еҲ°ж–ҮжЎЈ", "и®°еҪ•еҲ°ж–ҮжЎЈ", "дҝқеӯҳеҲ°ж–ҮжЎЈ", "еҶҷе…Ҙж–ҮжЎЈ"
- Pre-commit hooks for automatic documentation checks

If the user asks for a "report", "memo", "letter", "template", or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. в””в”Җв”Җ SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.774707198955E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7708789521828535E12},"xlsx":{"name":"xlsx","description":"Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output.
